SHLUKU

Keep your bottle.

Make it smart.

SHLUKU attaches to any bottle you already own, tracking every sip and adapting to your day.

75%
of people are chronically under-hydrated
2L
daily target most people consistently miss

The Problem

You don't need a
new bottle.

Smart bottles are expensive and make you replace the bottle you already love.

SHLUKU does it differently: a simple device that clips onto your bottle and makes it smart, accessible, and ready for everyday use.

The Solution

Same bottle.
New intelligence.

SHLUKU snaps onto the base of any standard-width bottle in seconds. Everything else - tracking, reminders, health sync - happens automatically from there.

01

Precision Tracking

Every sip, automatically tracked.

SHLUKU's built-in sensor follows your drinking activity and updates your progress in real time.

02

Intelligent Reminders

SHLUKU learns your rhythm and nudges you only when you drift off-pace. No hourly pings. Smart reminders that fit your routine and arrive at the right moment - without getting in the way.

03

Weather and Activity Adaptation

On hot days or after intense sessions, SHLUKU can raise your hydration target. Paired with a wearable, SHLUKU adapts to what your body needs.

04

Health App Sync

Native integration with Apple Health, Google Fit, and major smartwatch platforms. SHLUKU connects with your health data to build smarter drinking habits over time.

05

Recovery Mode

After an intense workout or a long flight, activate Recovery Mode. SHLUKU increases your target and sends timed reminders to help your body replenish faster.

06

USB-C Charging

SHLUKU charges via USB-C and holds a charge for a long time - no batteries to replace, no proprietary cables.

Multiple sizes

One smart upgrade.

Plastic bottle Sky
Sport bottle Slate
Steel bottle Plum
Tritan bottle Honey
